title: Assembly Reading
rules: preserve namespace, type, and member hierarchy
keep token and signature data available when relevant
avoid speculative renaming during initial pass
procedure: Extract fields, properties, methods, and signatures.
Store output for downstream dump or analysis stages.

primary_when: the request is about reading or inspecting managed assemblies
the request is about recovering type/member structure from a binary
the request mentions DLL inspection, Mono assemblies, or decompilation
must_not_own_when: the request is mainly about patching runtime behavior
the request is about UI rendering or generic optimization
